definitions.text: To pick; to make the choice of; to select.
examples: I chose a nice ripe apple from the fruit bowl.
He was chosen as president in 1990.

definitions.text: To decide to act in a certain way.
examples: I chose to walk to work today.

definitions.text: The binomial coefficient of the previous and following number.
examples: The number of distinct subsets of size k from a set of size n is ( n k ) {\displaystyle {\tbinom {n}{k}}} or "n choose k".

definitions.text: The power, right, or privilege of choosing; election.
